revision.comment: Text replacement - "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA ==" to "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]"
revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Ikanashi Shrine | image = File:伊加奈志神社.jpg | location = 635, Ikari-ko, Imabari-shi, Ehime-ken, Japan | coordinates = {{Coord|34.032778|N|132.977222|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = Five Pillars of Creation
Ikatarashihiko-no-Mikoto
Ikagasikooro-no-Mikoto | Status = {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} shrine
Provincial shrine of Iyo Province
Former Village Shrine | founded = | Architecture= | Other names = | festival = October 10 | Rituals = | prefecture= {{ill|Imabari|qid=Q461020|1=Imabari, Ehime}} }} '''Ikanashi Shrine''' (伊加奈志神社) is a Shinto shrine located in [[:en:Imabari|Imabari]], {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|en|Ehime Prefecture|qid=Q123376|lt=Ehime Prefecture|1=Ehime Prefecture}}, Japan. It is considered a provincial shrine (総社) of {{ill|Iyo Province|en|Iyo Province|qid=Q907829|lt=Iyo Province|1=Iyo Province}} and a {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} shrine. == Enshrined Deities == * Five Pillars of Creation (Five Heavenly Kami) * Ikatarashihiko-no-Mikoto (いかたらしひこのみこと), identified as a prince of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|en|Emperor Suinin|qid=Q314850|lt=Emperor Suinin|1=Emperor Suinin}} * Ikagasikooro-no-Mikoto (いかがしこおのみこと), believed to be an ancestral deity of the {{ill|Mononobe clan|en|Mononobe clan|qid=Q1755836|lt=Mononobe clan|1=Mononobe clan}} == History == The shrine is listed in the {{ill|Engishiki|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} under {{ill|Ochi District, Ehime|en|Ochi District, Ehime|qid=Q1206502|lt=Ochi District, Iyo Province|1=Ochi District, Ehime}}. Historically known as "Sosha Myojin" (総社明神), the shrine's proximity to the Soja River (蒼社川) reflects its importance as a regional spiritual center. The name "Ikanashi" is thought to derive from "Ikagasiko," a reference to the enshrined deity. The shrine's documents and treasures were lost in a fire during the {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei era|1=Ansei}} (1854–1860). == Grounds == ; main hall ; Worship Hall ; Sub-Shrines * Yamano-no-Kami Shrine: Dedicated to {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi|lt=Oyamatsumi|ja|大山積神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * Okuninushi Shrine: Dedicated to [[Ōkuninushi]] * Munakata Shrine: Dedicated to the {{ill|Three Munakata Goddesses|ja|宗像三女神|1=Three Munakata Goddesses|1=Three Munakata Goddesses|qq=Three Munakata Goddesses|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Munakata Goddesses|13=User:Immanuelle/Three Munakata Goddesses|qq=}} The nearby summit of the mountain hosts {{ill|Iwashimizu Hachiman Shrine (Imabari)|ja|石清水八幡神社 (今治市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachiman Shrine (Imabari)|1=Iwashimizu-Hachiman Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q55535314}}. == festivals == The shrine's festival takes place on October 10. A lottery system determines the heads of the shrine's organizing groups (10-household units) for the following year, and the festival is led by the selected leader (当屋). A kagami (mirror) ritual and mochi offering are central components. In addition to the festival, an early seedling festival (早苗祭) is held around {{ill|88th night|ja|八十八夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/88th night|1=Hachijūhachiya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11390609}}, when prayers for a bountiful harvest are made. File:Ikanasi 0ɜ.jpg|Stone steps leading to the shrine File:Ikanasi 0ɨ.jpg|Worship Hall File:Iwasimizu imabari ɨɜ.jpg|main hall File:Ikanasi 02.jpg|Sub-Shrine == References == == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|author=[[Tanikawa Kenichi]] (谷川健一) ed.|title=日本の神々 神社と聖地 2 山陽・四国|publisher=[[Hakusuisha]]|year=2000|isbn=4-560-02502-9}} {{Shinto}} {{Sōja shrines}} {{translated page|ja|伊加奈志神社|version=77036659|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Ikanashi-jinja}} == AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] '''Ikanashi Shrine (Q11378912)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Iyo Province]]. == Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | {{ill|Ochi District, Ehime|en|Ochi District, Ehime|ja|越智郡|ceb|Ochi-gun|es|Distrito de Ochi (Ehime)|fr|District d'Ochi (Ehime)|id|Distrik Ochi, Ehime|it|Distretto di Ochi|ko|오치군 (에히메현)|pl|Powiat Ochi|uk|Повіт Очі|zh|越智郡|lt=Ochi district|qid=Q1206502|1=Ochi District, Ehime}} || {{ill|Ikanashi Shrine|lt=Ikanashi Shrine|ja|伊加奈志神社|commons|Category:Ikanashi-jinja|qid=Q11378912|1=Ikanashi Shrine}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized|1=Kokuhei-sha}} || {{ill|Shikinai Shōsha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} || {{ill|sōja|qid=Q1107129|lt=sōja|1=Sōja shrine}} || — || {{coord|34.032619|132.977049|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=183252 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q11378912}}==Notes== [[da:d:Q11378912]] [[ja:伊加奈志神社]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Imabari, Ehime]] [[Category:History of Imabari, Ehime]] [[Category:Iyo Province]] [[Category:Iyo Province|Shrines]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Iyo Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ehime Prefecture]] [[Category:Son-sha]] [[Category:Son-sha in Ehime Prefecture]] [[Category:Sōja shrines]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
